WITH feb_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        h.hub_id,
        h.hub_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS feb_orders
    FROM hubs h
    JOIN stores s ON h.hub_id = s.hub_id
    JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'FINISHED' 
      AND o.order_created_month = 2
    GROUP BY h.hub_id, h.hub_name
),
mar_orders AS (
    SELECT

        h.hub_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS mar_orders
    FROM hubs h
    JOIN stores s ON h.hub_id = s.hub_id
